properties.name: Boyd v. City of San Rafael
notes: The first legal bundle now includes public filed-order copies for the TRO, preliminary injunction, and dismissal stages, plus the city's own official summaries of the amendment and implementation chain.
City records consistently say the operative Boyd injunction was grounded in ADA and Fourteenth Amendment state-created-danger theories, not the Eighth Amendment or Grants Pass directly.
